title: Screenshot JPG
description: Re-save screenshot in JPG format after screenshot.
body:
After the player takes a screenshot, re-save the screenshot in JPG format.
1. Read the PNG file
2. Convert it to JPG format
3. Save the JPG file
4. Delete the PNG file

If the converted JPG file is larger than the original PNG file, ignore this screenshot.

**Support Sinytra Connector!**
